title: Declares the UIDAI’s Central Identities Data Repository (CIDR) facilities, Information Assets, Logistics Infrastructure and Dependencies Installed at UIDAI (Unique Identification Authority of India) locations to be Protected System for the Purpose of Information Technology Act 2000.
description: Declares the UIDAI’s Central Identities Data Repository (CIDR) facilities, Information Assets, Logistics Infrastructure and Dependencies Installed at UIDAI (Unique Identification Authority of India) locations to be Protected System for the Purpose of Information Technology Act 2000.
alternate_descriptions: Declaration of UIDAI-CIDR critical information under section 70A of IT Act.

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (i) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 806] ubZ fnYyh] lkseokj] fnlEcj 21] 2015@vxzgk;.k 30] 1937 No. 806] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, DECEMBER 21, 2015/AGRAHAYANA 30, 1937 सं चार एवं सू चना ᮧौ᳒ ोिगकᳱ मंᮢ ालय (इले ᭍ᮝॉिनकᳱ और सू चना ᮧौ᳒ ोिगकᳱ िवभाग) (भारतीय िविश᭬ ट पहचान ᮧािधकरण) अिधसूचना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 11 ᳰदस᭥बर, 2015 सा. का. िन. 993(अ).—सूचना ᮧौ᳒ोिगकᳱ अिधिनयम, 2000 (2000 का 21 वां) के अनु᭒छेद 70 के उप-अनु᭒छेद (1) ᳇ारा ᮧद᭜त शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए, कᱶᮤ सरकार, एत द्᳇ारा घोिषत करती है ᳰक यू.आई.डी.ए.आई. कᳱ कᱶᮤीय पहचान डेटा भंडार (सी.आई.डी.आर.) सुिवधाएं, इसका हाडᭅवेयर और सॉ᭢टवेयर, सूचना पᳯरस᭥पिᱫयां, लॉिजि᭭टक अवसंरचना और िडपᱶडᱶिसज़ आᳰद जो ᳰक यू.आई.डी.ए.आई. (भारतीय िविश᭬ट पहचान ᮧािधकरण) के लोकेश᭠स पर सं᭭थािपत है – उ᭠हᱶ सूचना ᮧौ᳒ोिगकᳱ अिधिनयम 2000 के उ ᳎े᭫य से संरिᭃत िस᭭टम माना जाएगा। आई.टी. ए᭍ट 2000 (संशोिधत 2008) के अनु᭒छेद 70 के उप-अनु᭒छेद-2 के अनुसार ᮧािधकृत काᳶमकᲂ, िजनके पास कायᭅ आधाᳯरत पᱟंच होगी, केवल उ᭠हᱭ को ही यू.आई.डी.ए.आई.-सी.आई.डी.आर. सुिवधाᲐ तक जाने का अिधकार होगा: 1. यू.आई.डी.ए.आई. के पदनािमत आिधकारी और ᭭ टाफ। 2. मैने᭔ड सᳶवस ᮧोवाइडर (एम.एस.पी.) के अनुबंिधत सद᭭य, िज᭠ हᱶ यू.आई.डी.ए.आई. ने ᮧािधकृत कर रखा हो। 3. अ᭠य ᮧािधकृत थडᭅ पाटᱮ वᱶडसᭅ और इसके पाटᭅनसᭅ। 4. यू.आई.डी.ए.आई. के िबिजनेस पाटᭅनसᭅ। [फा. सं. डी- 10(36)/2015-ईजी-II], राजीव कुमार, संयुᲦ सिचव -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF COMMUNICATIONS AND INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY (Department of Electronic and Information Technology) (UNIQUE IDENTIFICATION AUHORITY OF INDIA) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 11th December, 2015 G.S.R. 993(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 70 of the Information Technology Act, 2000 (21 of 2000), the Central Government hereby declares the UIDAI’s Central Identities Data Repository (CIDR) facilities, Information Assets, Logistics Infrastructure and Dependencies Installed at UIDAI (Unique Identification Authority of India) locations to be Protected System for the Purpose of Information Technology Act 2000. Authorised personnel as per Sub-section (2) of Section 70 of IT Act 2000 (amended 2008) having role based access to UIDAI-CIDR facility are: 1. Designated UIDAI officers & Support Staff. 2. UIDAI authorised team members of contracted Managed Service Provider (MSP). 3. Other authorised third party Vendors and its partners. 4. UIDAI authorised business partners. [F. No. 10(36)/2015-EG-II] RAJIV KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
